ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "gyro_rad0" REAL /* Gyro rotation rate around axis 0 */,
  "gyro_rad1" REAL /* Gyro rotation rate around axis 1 */,
  "gyro_rad2" REAL /* Gyro rotation rate around axis 2 */,
  "gyro_integral_dt" INTEGER /* Integration time for gyro data */,
  "accelerometer_timestamp_relative" INTEGER /* Relative timestamp for accelerometer data */,
  "accelerometer_m_s20" REAL /* Acceleration along axis 0 */,
  "accelerometer_m_s21" REAL /* Acceleration along axis 1 */,
  "accelerometer_m_s22" REAL /* Acceleration along axis 2 */,
  "accelerometer_integral_dt" INTEGER /* Integration time for accelerometer data */,
  "basestation" INTEGER /* Identifier for the basestation receiving the data */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone used for the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot operating the drone */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the drone during flight */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the drone during flight */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the drone during flight */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the drone during flight */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "flight_mode" TEXT /* Flight mode (e.g., manual, autonomous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "flight_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone used for the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot operating the drone */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission associated with the flight */,
  "flight_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the flight */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the flight */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the flight */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the flight */,
  "flight_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drone (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Production date of the drone */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the drone */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date of the drone */,
  "total_flight_hours" INTEGER /* Total flight hours of the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the pilot */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pilot */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the pilot has */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Total training hours the pilot has completed */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the mission */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Project manager of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "total_flight_hours" INTEGER /* Total flight hours for the mission */,
  "total_distance_covered" REAL /* Total distance covered during the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's research team */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
